headline: Paycom Buyback And Earnings Update Spark Questions On Valuation And Risks
summary: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) reported strong first quarter results, adding fresh detail on its recent operating performance. The company also authorized a new US$2b share buyback program, expanding its capital return plans. Both updates were announced together, giving investors new information on earnings and capital allocation. Paycom Software focuses on cloud based human capital management solutions, serving employers that want payroll and HR functions on a single platform. The stock is...
